method: Choropleth map of California zip codes using: Latitude/Longitude for coordinates, churn_rate (churn_value count / total_population) for color encoding, zip_code as spatial unit. Interactive tooltip showing normalized churn rate per 10k population.
objective: Identify geographical hotspots of churn incidents adjusted for population density

method: Scatter plot with X=churn_score, Y=cltv, size=satisfaction_score, color=churn_label. Implement Voronoi hover for precise selection and marginal histograms for distribution context.
objective: Discover relationships between predictive scores and actual churn status

method: Heatmap with X=contract, Y=internet_type, color intensity=churn_rate (sum(churn_value)/group count). Add annotated text labels for exact percentages and sort axes by churn frequency.
objective: Identify high-risk service contract/internet type combinations

method: Multi-line chart with X=tenure (binned quarterly), Y=churn_rate (moving average), color=contract_type. Include confidence bands and contract duration markers at 12/24 months.
objective: Analyze how customer lifespan affects churn patterns across contract types

method: Cross-filtered views: 1) Hexbin map of zip_code clusters 2) Ordered bar chart of cities. Clicking a cluster filters city bars to show exact churn counts and population percentages.
objective: Drill-down analysis from regional patterns to municipal-level insights

method: Grouped bar chart with X=referral_count (binned 0,1-3,4+), Y=customer_count, color=customer_status. Error bars showing ±1σ churn rates within each referral group.
objective: Assess the retention impact of referral programs

method: Parallel coordinates plot showing paths from payment_method to monthly_charges_ranges to churn_status. Highlight automatic payment paths with lower churn rates.
objective: Compare payment behavior patterns across churn segments

method: Divergent bar chart showing CLTV-ChurnScore residuals (CLTV ranking - ChurnScore ranking). Highlight top/bottom 5% with satisfaction_score labels.
objective: Flag high-value customers with mismatched churn predictions
